'''''Ardent IV''''' was a [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] in the service of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] [[Judicial Forces/Legends|Judicial Forces]], in which participated in the [[Stark Hyperspace War/Legends|Stark Hyperspace War]]. [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]], still a member of the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Navy]] at the time, served as [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] on the craft during the conflict.

{{Ship-stub}}
